turns.content:
You are hm-code-reviewer. Conduct a coverage audit of 58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md — verify every task in the plan was actually executed and every must-have is satisfied.

## Inputs (read FULL)

1. .planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md (558 lines — the plan to audit)
2. .planning/phases/58-tmux-orchestration-programmatic-pool-interactive-delegate-cl/58-SPEC.md (lines 184-290 = 5 new REQs with ACs)

## Output target

.planning/debug/p58-coverage-audit-2026-06-04.md

## What to check (per plan Section 10 — Atomic Commit Strategy)

For each of the 28-29 atomic commits the plan promised, check if it was actually made:

### Wave 1: 4 RED BATS tests
- phase-58-gap-fix(test): add (red) BATS 71-panel-live-update for S1 capture-pane
- phase-58-gap-fix(test): add (red) BATS 72-user-inject for S2 user-tier whitelist
- phase-58-gap-fix(test): add (red) BATS 73-stream-stays-open for S3 WaiterModel
- phase-58-gap-fix(test): add (red) BATS 74-progress-mid-flight for S4 event bus

For each, verify file exists at the expected path AND commit exists in git log.

### Wave 2A: 5 S1 implementation commits
- capturePaneContent in TmuxMultiplexer
- SessionManager.startPolling + getLatestCapture
- polling backoff (5s → 15s on stable content)
- peek action in delegation-status Zod union
- wire polling start into dispatch() lifecycle

Verify each: file:line for the actual implementation, commit hash, AC reference.

### Wave 2B: 3 S2 commits
- USER_SESSION tier in tmux-copilot whitelist
- peek action in tmux-copilot Zod union
- regression guard marker for forward-prompt manualOverride

### Wave 2C: 4 S3 commits
- pre-send validation before fire-and-forget
- void sendPromptAsync at manager-runtime:244
- auto-poll callback to coordinator.onChildSessionCreated
- WaiterModel comment fix at delegate-task.ts:32 (true-fire-and-forget)

### Wave 2D: 5 S4 commits
- child-event-stream.ts with subscribe/unsubscribe API
- singleton childEventStream + ring buffer
- wire subscribe (NOTE: at coordinator.ts:200 per D-58-29, NOT manager-runtime.ts)
- wire unsubscribe into coordinator.recordDelegationTerminal
- progress action in delegation-status Zod union

### Wave 3: 3 integration commits
- BATS 62-70 regression suite green
- 27-tool-key invariant documentation in 58-VERIFICATION.md
- AC#10/AC#11 regression documentation

### Wave 4: 5 META docs commits
- USER-PAIN-BACKLOG.md with S1-S4 entries
- User-Pain Coverage section in spec.md template
- Human-Driven UAT section in verification.md template
- Symptom Coverage Matrix in ROADMAP.md
- 58-VERIFICATION-EXTEND.md with human UAT evidence

## Must-haves check (per plan Section "must_haves")

Verify each truth:
- [ ] After delegate-task, parent tmux panel receives child events in real time (capture-pane content updated within 1s of child tool.execute.after) — STATUS
- [ ] delegation-status {action: peek, delegationId} returns last captured pane content with non-empty content for active delegations — STATUS
- [ ] tmux-copilot {action: take-over} from user-session (agent='user') returns success, not permission-denied — STATUS
- [ ] After delegate-task returns, orchestrator's main stream remains open for 60+ seconds — STATUS
- [ ] delegation-status {action: progress, delegationId} returns live counters AND lastEvent from in-memory bus — STATUS
- [ ] .planning/USER-PAIN-BACKLOG.md exists with S1-S4 entries and source citations — STATUS
- [ ] Human-driven UAT verdict captured in 58-VERIFICATION-EXTEND.md — STATUS (will be FAIL since META-04 is post-execution, awaiting user sign-off)
- [ ] 27-tool-key invariant preserved — STATUS
- [ ] AC#10 and AC#11 manualOverride regression continues to pass — STATUS

## Artifacts check (per plan)

For each artifact listed in `artifacts:`, verify file exists with the right `provides:` and `contains:` patterns.

## Gaps to flag

- Plan tasks NOT executed (commit missing)
- Must-haves NOT satisfied
- Artifacts missing or wrong
- Mismatch between plan and reality

## Honest verdict

Per .planning/AGENTS.md: "Planning docs SHALL NOT claim runtime readiness from docs-only evidence." This audit is L5 documentation. Code-level BATS/vitest/tsc verification is a separate task.

Be honest about:
- What is verified by code/git/file existence (L1-L4)
- What requires REAL UAT sign-off (L4 human-driven)
- What is still PENDING (META-04 human gate)

## Output format

```
# P58.8 Plan Coverage Audit — 2026-06-04

## Executive Verdict
- Total plan tasks: N
- Executed: N
- Missing: N
- Must-haves satisfied: N/N
- Critical gaps: list

## Wave 1 (RED BATS): 4/4 — STATUS
- R1 (slot 71): file exists, commit hash, ACs covered
- R2 (slot 72): ...
- R3 (slot 73): ...
- R4 (slot 74): ...

## Wave 2A (S1): 5/5 — STATUS
- I1 capturePaneContent: file:line, commit
- ...

## Wave 2B (S2): 3/3 — STATUS
- I6 USER_SESSION tier: ...
- ...

[repeat for all waves]

## Must-haves check
- [x] [truth satisfied]
- [ ] [truth NOT satisfied — with reason]

## Artifacts check
- file:line for each artifact

## Gaps
- gap 1: ...
- gap 2: ...

## Ready for REAL UAT? YES/NO (with reason)
```

## Constraints

- L5 documentation only
- ONLY write to .planning/debug/p58-coverage-audit-2026-06-04.md
- Use git log --oneline, file existence checks, grep, offset-read
- Cite file:line evidence
- Target 200-400 lines

## Return

- File path
- Line count
- Executive verdict (1 sentence)
- Critical gap count
- Ready for REAL UAT (YES/NO)
I'll conduct a thorough coverage audit of the 58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md plan. Let me start by loading the required inputs.
Now let me read the spec file for the 5 new REQs.
Now let me start the actual audit. First, let me check git history for the gap-fix commits and verify the file existence.
I see the actual implementation differs from the plan's commit naming. Let me dig deeper to verify file existence and content.
Let me check the actual code implementations of the plan tasks.
Now let me check S3 (WaiterModel keep-alive) and S4 (event bus) implementation details.
Let me verify the file:line evidence and check for the META items.
Let me check the 27-tool-key invariant and AC#10/AC#11 manualOverride regression check.
Now let me verify the META items and look for the regression guard marker.
Let me also verify a few more items before writing the audit report.
I have all the evidence. Let me now ensure `.planning/debug/` exists and write the audit.
Now I'll write the audit report.

## REVIEW COMPLETE

**Plan:** 58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX
**Verdict:** FAIL (1 BLOCKER — M5/58-VERIFICATION-EXTEND.md missing)
**Findings:**
- BLOCKER: 1
- WARNING (deviations): 8
- INFO: 0

**Report:** `.planning/debug/p58-coverage-audit-2026-06-04.md` (174 lines)

**Executive verdict (1 sentence):** Code-level work is COMPLETE (Waves 1-3 + META M1-M4) but the FINAL gate M5 (`58-VERIFICATION-EXTEND.md`) — which requires the human front-facing operator's REAL UAT sign-off per AC-58-META-04 and D-58-36 — does not exist and cannot be authored by AI.

**Critical gap count:** 1 (M5 — REAL UAT verdict file is MISSING by design, awaiting human operator per `58-PLAN-08-GAP-FIX.md:280` and `<resume-signal>` at line 509)

**Ready for REAL UAT?** YES (code-complete per `.planning/ROADMAP.md:2059`); ship requires the human operator to run the 4 S1-S4 verification procedures and record verdict in `58-VERIFICATION-EXTEND.md`.

**Key deviations flagged (non-blocking):**
- S4 SUBSCRIBE was wired at `manager-runtime.ts:527` instead of plan's `coordinator.ts:200` (D-58-29 contradicted)
- S3 commits use `fix(58):` prefix (0/4 with planned `phase-58-gap-fix(S3)` prefix)
- Total commits: 22 actual vs 29 promised (S1 I2+I3 bundled, S2 expanded 3→5, M5 missing)
- child-event-stream.ts: 220 LOC vs ≤100 target
- 4 modules exceed 500 LOC cap (coordinator 605, manager-runtime 616, tmux-multiplexer 606, delegation-status 891)
